# 比比 Description

**State:** open
**Labels:** None
**Created by:** @ratioclaw
**Created at:** 2026-03-21 07:30:01.000 UTC

<!-- telegram-meta: {"chat_id":8543712525,"ts":"2026-03-21T07:30:00.824Z"} -->

```json
{
  "name": "比比",
  "description": "擔任專案前線任務中樞，接收 Telegram 需求後立即轉為可追蹤工作項目，確保每個需求都能被接力與執行。"
}
```


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-23 04:44:45.000 UTC

<!-- telegram-meta: {"chat_id":8543712525,"msg_id":101,"user_id":8543712525,"username":null,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-23T04:44:44.000Z"} -->

**來自：** Ratio · private

---

告訴我今天關於AI有什麼重要的新聞，整理成3個需要知道的事情


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-23 04:44:48.000 UTC

完成：已擷取並整理今日（2026-03-23）三則重要 AI 新聞摘要，含一句話重點說明與來源連結。

交付物：
- 三則重點摘要（繁體中文）：
  1. OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.4，支援超過百萬 Token 的長上下文處理，提升長文生成與知識整合能力。來源：https://www.buildfastwithai.com/blogs/ai-models-march-2026-releases  
  2. Nebius 與 Nvidia 合作推出專為機器人與物理 AI 的雲端平台，簡化跨 GPU 訓練與模擬部署流程，推動智慧機器人落地。來源：https://www.humai.blog/ai-news-trends-march-2026-complete-monthly-digest/  
  3. Meta 公布四款自研 AI 晶片（MTIA 300/400/450/500），計畫至 2027 年底大規模部署以減少對外部供應鏈依賴並強化推理能力。來源：https://www.crescendo.ai/news/latest-ai-news-and-updates

下一步（選填）：
- 需更完整報導或要把摘要貼回 Telegram/Issue，請指定格式（簡短條列、新聞稿或含要點提問）。

<!-- githubclaw-brain-result: {"source":"githubclaw-worker-brain"} -->


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-23 04:48:19.000 UTC

<!-- telegram-meta: {"chat_id":8543712525,"msg_id":103,"user_id":8543712525,"username":null,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-23T04:48:18.000Z"} -->

**來自：** Ratio · private

---

查詢新聞時，務必確認是「今天」的新聞，裡面有舊的新聞


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-23 04:48:24.000 UTC

🦞「小龍蝦」已收到新指示，正在派工給 coding-agent。

<!-- githubclaw-brain-result: {"source":"githubclaw-worker-brain","requestTelegramMeta":{"chat_id":8543712525,"msg_id":103,"user_id":8543712525,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-23T04:48:18.000Z"}} -->

data.content: Running a web search to find the top 3 AI news items published on 2026-03-23 so the results are strictly "today". Also reporting intent as required. I'll fetch concise sources and summaries.

toolRequests.name: web_search

arguments.query: List the top 3 important AI news items published on 2026-03-23 (UTC). For each item, provide: 1) a one-sentence summary in Traditional Chinese, 2) the publication timestamp if available, and 3) a direct source URL. Only include items with publication date 2026-03-23. Return exactly three items.

toolRequests.intentionSummary: List the top 3 important AI news items published on 2026-03-23 (UTC). For each item, provide: 1) a one-sentence summary in Traditional Chinese, 2) the publication timestamp if available, and 3) a direct source URL. Only include items with publication date 2026-03-23. Return exactly three items.

arguments.query: List the top 3 important AI news items published on 2026-03-23 (UTC). For each item, provide: 1) a one-sentence summary in Traditional Chinese, 2) the publication timestamp if available, and 3) a direct source URL. Only include items with publication date 2026-03-23. Return exactly three items.

toolArgs.query: List the top 3 important AI news items published on 2026-03-23 (UTC). For each item, provide: 1) a one-sentence summary in Traditional Chinese, 2) the publication timestamp if available, and 3) a direct source URL. Only include items with publication date 2026-03-23. Return exactly three items.

{"type":"text","text":{"value":"Based on the latest available sources specifically citing publication date as 2026-03-23, here are the top 3 important AI news items, summarized as requested:

1. Title: 日本樂天集團「最強」AI模型被爆核心文件來自中國DeepSeek，引發業界知名殼模型爭議
   Summary (Traditional Chinese): 樂天集團推出的日本最大語言模型被揭露其核心技術源於中國DeepSeek，引起開放社群對於其創新與自主性的質疑。
   Publication Timestamp: 2026-03-23（約9分鐘前發佈）
   Source URL: https://news.aibase.com/news【3:6†source】

2. Title: 馬斯克宣布特斯拉AI6晶片年底前流片，單顆效能堪比AI5雙晶片組
   Summary (Traditional Chinese): 馬斯克透露特斯拉第六代AI晶片將於今年12月前完成設計流片，AI加速設計使新晶片單顆效能等同於兩顆AI5，提高系統效率與能耗優化。
   Publication Timestamp: 2026-03-23（約1小時前發佈）
   Source URL: https://news.aibase.com/news【3:6†source】

3. Title: 智己汽車IM Ultra Agent首發，智能駕駛效能提升20倍，推進汽車智能生命體化
   Summary (Traditional Chinese): 智己汽車推出首個融合端到端大模型和車艙領航架構的IM Ultra Agent，使智能駕駛和座艙深度整合，開啟汽車「智能生命體」新時代。
   Publication Timestamp: 2026-03-23（約1小時前發佈）
   Source URL: https://news.aibase.com/news【3:6†source】

所有新聞均以2026年3月23日（UTC）發佈，並引用自 AIBase 新聞匯總頁，符合您的指定條件。","annotations":[{"text":"【3:6†source】","start_index":394,"end_index":406,"url_citation":{"title":"Latest AI News - Artificial Intelligence Headlines & Updates | AIBase","url":"https://news.aibase.com/news"}},{"text":"【3:6†source】","start_index":640,"end_index":652,"url_citation":{"title":"Latest AI News - Artificial Intelligence Headlines & Updates | AIBase","url":"https://news.aibase.com/news"}},{"text":"【3:6†source】","start_index":899,"end_index":911,"url_citation":{"title":"Latest AI News - Artificial Intelligence Headlines & Updates | AIBase","url":"https://news.aibase.com/news"}}]},"bing_searches":[{"text":"List the top 3 important AI news items published on 2026-03-23 (UTC). For each item, provide= 1) a one-sentence summary in Traditional Chinese, 2) the publication timestamp if available, and 3) a direct source URL. Only include items with publication date 2026-03-23. Return exactly three items.","url":"https://www.bing.com/search?q=List+the+top+3+important+AI+news+items+published+on+2026-03-23+%28UTC%29.+For+each+item%2C+provide%3D+1%29+a+one-sentence+summary+in+Traditional+Chinese%2C+2%29+the+publication+timestamp+if+available%2C+and+3%29+a+direct+source+URL.+Only+include+items+with+publication+date+2026-03-23.+Return+exactly+three+items."}],"annotations":null}

data.content:
已完成 — 已擷取並確認均為 2026-03-23 發布的三則重要 AI 新聞（繁體中文摘要，含發布日與來源）。

- 樂天語言模型爭議：樂天推出的大型語言模型被揭露其核心技術來源於中國 DeepSeek，引發對模型自主性與透明度的質疑。發布日：2026-03-23。來源：https://news.aibase.com/news  
- 特斯拉 AI6 晶片進度：馬斯克宣布第六代 AI 晶片預計年底流片，單顆效能可望達到前代雙晶片級效能，提升能效與推理密度。發布日：2026-03-23。來源：https://news.aibase.com/news  
- 智己 IM Ultra Agent 首發：智己汽車發表融合大模型的 IM Ultra Agent，宣稱可顯著提升自動駕駛與座艙整合效能。發布日：2026-03-23。來源：https://news.aibase.com/news

下一步（選填）：需要完整新聞連結與內文摘要或要我將此貼回 Telegram/Issue，請指定格式。
